title: Prague Metro Decorations
description: Decorative blocks inspired by the Prague underground. Designed primarily for the MTR mod.
body:
# Prague Metro Decorations for Minecraft Transit Railway

This mod enhances your Minecraft Transit Railway experience by adding decorative and functional blocks inspired by the Prague Metro system. It’s perfect for builders and enthusiasts looking to bring the iconic design and atmosphere of Prague’s underground to their Minecraft worlds.

### Key Features:
- Authentic Decorations: Add realistic Prague Metro elements, such as station walls, floors, and signs, to create immersive underground environments.
- Functional Blocks: Includes interactive blocks designed to integrate seamlessly with the MTR mod.
Version Compatibility: Currently optimized for Fabric 1.20.1, with plans for future support for older and newer Minecraft versions.
- Modpack Friendly: Fully compatible with modpacks, allowing easy integration into your custom worlds.
### Why Download?
Whether you're a fan of metro systems, a builder looking for unique decor, or someone who loves detailed transportation networks, this mod brings a slice of Prague to your Minecraft experience. Transform your stations and tunnels with authentic, high-quality assets inspired by the real world!

Feel free to share in modpacks and showcase your creations!
